cd /usr/src && make buildworld

cc  -O2 -pipe  -I/usr/src/lib/libnv -MD  -MF.depend.dnvlist.o -MTdnvlist.o -std=gnu99  -Qunused-arguments  -I/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/legacy/usr/include -c /usr/src/sys/contrib/libnv/dnvlist.c -o dnvlist.o
